positive: A stylized symmetrical pattern featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and abstract geometric lines. The main subject is a stylized, symmetrical arrangement of glowing lunar blossoms and crystalline mandalas, set against a deep indigo twilight background. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of electric teal, deep violet, glowing gold, and sapphire blue. The style should blend Art Deco symmetry with hyper-detailed psychedelic nature. Focus on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and a central, medallion-like composition suitable for repeating apparel print. Studio lighting, extreme detail, vector quality, UHD, smooth gradient transitions.
